title: marsilea elata var. crenata
intro: Marsilea elata var. crenata, also known as Water Clover or Four-Leaf Clover, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Marsileaceae family. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and alleviate symptoms of various health conditions. The health benefits of Marsilea elata var. crenata include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, which are consumed to harness its medicinal benefits and promote overall well-being.
